jatosR 0.5.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Transforms raw data to JSON list

Source: R/raw_json.R
raw_json.Rd

Takes raw results stored in data_raw and adds new column data_json containing data in lists created by jsonlite package. The package jsonlite must be installed for this function to work. It is expected that the parameter d is the dataset obtained with process_results, but the dataset can be simpler, because only the column data_raw is used.

Usage

raw_json(d)

Arguments

d

Tibble with data obtained with process_results, or a list containing such a tibble in its data element. Errors if neither shape is provided.

Value

Tibble with new list column data_json, or the input list with its data tibble replaced by the same (see Details)

Details

Function process_results returns a list (let's assume called results), raw_json is intended to be used in tibble pipeline, i.e. on the result$data tibble. To simplify the process, the function detects, whether it is provided with a list containing a tibble called data. In that case, it processes the data tibble, puts it back into the original list and returns it.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
demo <- prepare_demo()
r <- process_results(demo$meta, demo$results)
# working with tibbles
rdata <- r$data |> raw_json()
# shortcut for the results list also works
r <- r |> raw_json()
clean_demo()
} # }
